title: PolicyConfig
description: Governance configuration consumed by the Decision Policy Engine. The static_rules member is intentionally permissive until DGOS-T-0039 finalizes detailed rule shape.
$comment: PolicyConfig is standalone governance input, not an envelope artifact. Protocol wire fields use snake_case.

product_baseline_approved.description: REQUIRED boolean. False keeps delegated product decisions guarded until the product baseline is approved.

staticRules.title: PolicyStaticRules
staticRules.description: Reserved container for structured static allow/deny rules. DGOS-T-0039 narrows this shape.
